targets.query:
from(bucket: "metrics")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r["_measurement"] == "swop.api.calls")
  |> aggregateWindow(every: v.windowPeriod, fn: count)

from(bucket: "metrics")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r["_measurement"] == "conversion.fallback.rates")
  |> aggregateWindow(every: v.windowPeriod, fn: count)

from(bucket: "metrics")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r["_measurement"] == "jvm.memory.used")
  |> aggregateWindow(every: v.windowPeriod, fn: mean)

from(bucket: "metrics")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r["_measurement"] == "swop.api.fallback")
  |> aggregateWindow(every: v.windowPeriod, fn: count)

from(bucket: "metrics")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r["_measurement"] == "http.server.requests")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r["_field"] == "sum")
  |> aggregateWindow(every: v.windowPeriod, fn: mean)
